fix_summary: The maintainer stopped prop-drilling `survey` and `environment` through SurveyAnalysisCTA (which already used useEnvironment() for `project`) and its children; both are now read from context via useSurvey()/useEnvironment(), and the drilled props were removed from the call sites. NOTE: this summary is provenance only — the grader scores against fix.diff (the real change), never this prose.
